violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The fans in the walk-in has an accumulation of dust debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the entrance vestibule, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC placed work order during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the open-air case vent grates have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -box walk-in fan guards -door tracks to shelving (box walk-in) -floors in box walk-in -floors under shelving (sales floor, storage room near back door) -floors of walk-in (garbage/waste area). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Various packaged foods were observed held at (44-46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview of PIC, foods were recently stocked. Inspector also observed packages stocked beyond load limit that may be affecting proper air flow to case. Foods out of temperature were placed into other refrigerator to chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the grates of open air cases have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
